win_condition: First team to reveal all of its team words wins immediately.
tiebreaker: No point tiebreaker; game ends immediately on win/loss trigger (including assassin loss).

categories.label: All Team Words Revealed
categories.description: Team wins by revealing all of its own words first.

categories.label: Assassin Avoided
categories.description: Revealing assassin causes immediate loss, so avoiding it is mandatory.
